title: sports-registry — product analytics

events.name: Sport Registry Custom Sport Created
events.description: Tenant admin created a custom Sport. Feeds the sports-registry-adoption dashboard — Enterprise tenants adding customs signal programme diversity that platform admins may want to codify into the platform catalog.

events.name: Sport Registry Custom Discipline Created
events.description: Tenant admin created a custom Discipline. `sport_is_platform_seeded` distinguishes 'custom Discipline under platform Sport' (extending the taxonomy) from 'custom Discipline under custom Sport' (fully custom branch).

events.name: Sport Registry Deactivated
events.description: entity_kind: sport / discipline / position. Feeds the downstream-impact dashboard — deactivations with high downstream_reference_count signal breaking changes that need customer comms.

events.name: Sport Registry Custom Disabled
events.description: Small or Medium tier tenant attempted to create a custom. Feeds the upsell funnel — the frequency of these refusals per tenant signals a strong Enterprise upgrade candidate.

events.name: Sport Registry Quota Exceeded
events.description: Attempt to create a custom past the sports_registry_custom_slot cap. Enterprise default is unlimited, so this fires rarely — but it exists in case a future tier variant introduces a cap.

events.name: Sport Registry Resolver Called
events.description: outcome: matched / unresolved. level: sport / sport+discipline / triple. cache_status: hit / miss. Sample-throttled to 1% because the resolver is called on nearly every Wave 3 write.

events.name: Sport Registry Prefix Resolution Failed
events.description: The reconciler detected a dangling reference. `resolver_context`: read / write / reconciler — distinguishes runtime failures from batch scans. Feeds the drift dashboard.

events.name: Sport Registry Catalog Seeded
events.description: Platform seeder completed. seeded_by: platform_boot / admin_reseed / legacy_backfill_command.

events.name: Sport Registry Catalog Updated
events.description: Platform admin ran a reseed that changed the catalog. Feeds the versioning dashboard.

notes: sport_id / discipline_id / position_id are ULIDs (anonymised identifiers). No PII risk.
The registry carries zero PII by design — every event is safe to route to Segment + downstream analytics without redaction.

The high-volume 'Sport Registry Resolver Called' event is sampled to 1% (`config('sports_registry.telemetry.resolver_sample_ratio')`) — the resolver is called on nearly every Wave 3 write + resolver cache tuning is more useful than a full call trace.
